title: zollikoferia arabica var. squarrosa
intro: Zollikoferia arabica var. squarrosa, also known as the prickly zollikoferia, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, and its leaves and flowers have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as promote wound healing and improve digestive health. Zollikoferia arabica var. squarrosa can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and it is often used in herbal remedies to support overall health and well-being.
